children.name: chromium
ConsoleApp/ConsoleAnalytics.spec.js
Console analytics
Verify that a free user cannot access the Analytics page in the console application and is prompted to upgrade.
Verify that Profession plan User can access the Analytics page in the console application.
Verify that Teams plan User can access the Analytics page in the console application.
ConsoleApp/ConsoleBranding.spec.js
Console app - Branding Access Validation
Free user is prompted to upgrade when accessing the Branding page.
Profession plan user is prompted to upgrade when accessing the Branding page.
Team plan user is prompted to upgrade when accessing the Branding page.
ConsoleApp/ConsoleOrgAdmins.spec.js
Console app
Verify that professional user cannot access the OrgAdmins page in the console application and is prompted to upgrade team plan.
Verify that Teams plan user can access OrgAdmins page and add OrgAdmin
Verify that inactive orgAdmin cannot login.
Verify that Teams plan user can delete OrgAdmin if available
ConsoleApp/ConsoleOrganisation.spec.js
Console app
Verify that a free user cannot access the Organisations page in the console application and is prompted to upgrade.
Verify that Professional plan user cannot access the Organisations page in the console application and is prompted to upgrade team plan.
Verify that Teams plan user can access Organizations page and create an organization
ConsoleApp/ConsoleSignCertificate.spec.js
Console app
Verify that a free user cannot access the Signing certificate page in the console application and is prompted to upgrade.
Verify that Professional plan user cannot access the Signing certificate page in the console application and is prompted to upgrade Team plan.
Verify that Team plan user can access the Signing certificate page in the console application and can upload the pfx certificate.
ConsoleApp/ConsoleStorage.spec.js
Console app
Verify that a free user cannot access the Storage page in the console application and is prompted to upgrade.
Verify that Professional plan user cannot access the Storage page in the console application and is prompted to upgrade Team plan.
Verify that Team plan user set the custom file storage AWSS3
Verify that a Team Plan user can configure custom file storage using DigitalOcean and is able to update the storage settings.
ConsoleApp/General.spec.js
Console app - General page
Verify that a free user cannot access the General page and is prompted to upgrade.
Verify that signature type selection in Console reflects in Preferences.
Verify Preferences refresh keeps the Email tab guidance available.
Verify that Allow email template customization is off in Console General and Email Preferences loads.
Verify that Enable individual user smtp settings is off in Console General and Email Preferences loads.
Verify that Team plan user can access the General page and save settings.
Verify that professional plan users cannot access the General page.
MainAppPages/APItoken.spec.js
API Token
Verify that free user cannot generate the live api token.
Verify that free user can generate the sanbox test token.
MainAppPages/Contact.spec.js
Contact
Verify that user can add a new contact.
Verify that user cannot add a new contact with an existing email address
Verify that user can import contacts from an Excel file and delete them across pages.
MainAppPages/CreateTemplate.spec.js
Templates
Verify that a new free user cannot access the paid features on the create template and edit template page.
Verify that a new user can create a template and use it to create the document for selfsign.
Verify that a new free user is unable to send the document through bulk send and is prompted to upgrade.
Verify that an existing Team Plan user can create a template using all advanced fields in the Create New Template form.
Verify that a Team Plan user can create a template, make it public, and sign the document through the public template.
Verify that the signature settings function correctly for the signature widget on the create template.
Verify that the merge page functions correctly and the user can sign the merged document in the create template.
Verify that the delete page functions correctly in create template.
Verify that the rotate page functions correctly in create template.
Verify that the signer can received the email from default email template.
MainAppPages/Dashboard.spec.js
Dashboard
Verify that the Sign yourself card click functions correctly and redirects the user to the Signyourself page from the dashboard.
Verify that the Request signature card click functions correctly and redirects the user to the Request signature page from the dashboard.
Verify that the Need your signature card click functions correctly and redirects the user to the Need your sign report from the dashboard.
Verify that clicking the Out for Signatures card functions correctly and redirects the user to the In-Progress report from the dashboard.
Verify that the Need Your Signature count on the card increases when a new document is created and the owner is added as a signer.
Verify that the Out for signature count on the card increases when a new document sent for request signature.
Verify that the unfinished SignYourSelf document can be edited from the Dashboard draft document.
Verify that pagination is functioning correctly in the dashboard drafts document.
Verify that owner can create the document and sign it from the dashboard recent signature requests.
Verify that pagination is functioning correctly in the dashboard recent signature requests.
Verify that the document sent for a signature request appears in the Recently Sent for Signatures section on the dashboard.
Verify that the document created from a template appears in the Recently Sent for Signatures section on the dashboard.
Verify that the document created from a template bulksend appears in the Recently Sent for Signatures section on the dashboard.
Verify that the user can rename and delete a document from the dashboard Recently sent for signatures.
Verify that user can resend the email from the dashboard Recently sent for signatures.
Verify that the user can revoke the document from the dashboard Recently sent for signatures.
Verify that pagination is functioning correctly in the dashboard Recently sent for signatures.
MainAppPages/Login.spec.js
Login Page Tests > Positive Login Tests
Verify that user can login with valid credentials Teams plan user
Verify that user can login with valid Pro plan credentials
Verify that login page displays correct page title
Verify that form submission works with Enter key on password field
Verify that user profile menu is visible after login
Verify that user is redirected to dashboard after successful login
Login Page Tests > Negative Login Tests
Verify that login fails with invalid email address
Verify that login fails with invalid password
Verify that login is not allowed with both email and password empty
Verify that user cannot login with email only (no password)
Verify that user cannot login with password only (no email)
Login Page Tests > Login Page UI and Validation Tests
Verify that email and password fields have proper labels
Verify that password field is masked (input type is password)
Verify that password is masked when entered
Verify that Create account button is visible and clickable
Verify that Forgot password link is visible
Verify that form fields accept proper input
Verify that email field clears correctly
Verify that password field clears correctly
Verify that Tab navigation works between form fields
Login Page Tests > Login State and Session Tests
Verify that multiple sequential login attempts work correctly
Verify that after successful login, going back to login URL redirects to dashboard
Verify that session is cleared after failed login attempt
Verify that browser back button works correctly on login page
Login Page Tests > Login Page Accessibility Tests
Verify that all interactive elements are keyboard accessible
Verify that form does not auto-submit when clicking in field
Verify that page scroll to top when login page loads
MainAppPages/Mysignature.spec.js
My signature
Verify that New user can draw and save the signature on the my signature page.
Verify that New user can upload and save the signature on the my signature page.
MainAppPages/pdfsCompatibility.spec.js
Incompatiblepdfs
Verify that the user can successfully sign a PDF that was previously incompatible ERR_PDF
Verify that the user can successfully sign a PDF that was previously incompatible pdf Order Form
Verify that the user can successfully sign a PDF that was previously incompatible pdf 10pages.
Verify that the user can successfully sign a PDF that was previously incompatible pdf 20pages
Verify that user can perform the sign yourself using the word document
MainAppPages/Preferences.spec.js
Preferences
Verify that New free user can save the general preferences.
Verify that a new free user cannot save email preferences is prompted to upgrade
Free user cannot update settings for Notify on Signature and Merge Certificate PDF
Team plan user can access the Email page.
MainAppPages/Reportcompleteddoc.spec.js
Completed documents
Verify that the document signed by SignYourSelf is available in the Completed Document Report and can be deleted.
Verify that pagination is functioning correctly in the completed document.
Verify that the document signed by SignYourSelf can be viewed from the Completed Document Report.
MainAppPages/ReportDeclineddoc.spec.js
Declined documents
Verify that revoked document from the In Progress document is available on the declined documents report.
MainAppPages/ReportDraftdoc.spec.js
Verify that the unfinished SignYourSelf document is available in the Drafts Document Report and can be deleted.
Verify that the unfinished SignYourSelf document can be edited from the Draft Document Report and completed by adding the required widgets.
Verify that pagination is functioning correctly in the drafts document.
MainAppPages/ReportExpiredDoc.spec.js
Expired documents
Verify that pagination is functioning correctly in the Expired documents.
MainAppPages/ReportInprogress.spec.js
Inprogress report
Verify that owner can create the document and sign it from the in-progress report.
Verify the column names and the document details on the inprogress report.
Verify that pagination is functioning correctly in the inprogress document table.
Verify that the user can rename and delete a document from the In Progress document.
Verify that the user can resend the email from the In Progress document.
Verify that the user can revoke the document from the In Progress document.
MainAppPages/ReportNeedYourSign.spec.js
Need your signature
Verify that owner can create the document and sign it from the need your signature report.
Verify the column name and the document details on the need your signature report.
Verify that pagination is functioning correctly in the need your signature table.
MainAppPages/Request_Signature.spec.js
Request signature
Verify that new user can create and send the document for request signature.
Verify that user can create a document of type image and send it for a signature request.
Verify that an existing user can create a document and sign it when added as a self-signer.
Verify that a user can create a document, send it for a signature request, and signer can successfully sign the document.
Verify that a user can create a document with enable otp true and send it for a signature request, and signer can sign the document.
Verify that a user can create a document with two signers, send it for a signature request, and signer can successfully sign the document.
Verify that a new free user cannot access the paid features on the request signature page.
Verify that the tour guide messages not displayed for an existing signer when the tour guide is set to disabled.
Verify that the signer redireced to the url if redirect url is set.
Verify that the signer can add the widget if the allowed modification set to enabled.
Verify that the signature settings function correctly for the signature widget on the request signature page.
Verify that the merge page functions correctly and the user can sign the merged document in request signature.
Verify that the delete page functions correctly in request signature.
Verify that the rotate page functions correctly in request signature.
Verify that signature widget Copy widget to all pages function correctly in request signature.
Verify that signature widgets Copy widget to all pages but last function correctly in request signature.
Verify that signature widgets Copy widget to all pages but first function correctly in request signature.
Verify that signature widgets Copy widget next to current function correctly in request signature.
Verify that stamp widget Copy widget to all pages function correctly in request signature.
Verify that stamp widgets Copy widget to all pages but last function correctly in request signature.
Verify that stamp widgets Copy widget to all pages but first function correctly in request signature.
Verify that stamp widgets Copy widget next to current function correctly in request signature.
Verify that initials widget Copy widget to all pages function correctly in request signature.
Verify that initials widgets Copy widget to all pages but last function correctly in request signature.
Verify that initials widgets Copy widget to all pages but first function correctly in request signature.
Verify that initials widgets Copy widget next to current function correctly in request signature.
Verify that text widgets settings for Name, Job Title, Company, Text, and Email function correctly in request signature.
Verify that name,job title, company, checkbox, image and email widgets Copy function correctly in request signature.
Verify that checkbox widget settings options function correctly in request signature.
Verify that prefill text widgets Copy widget to all pages function correctly in request signature.
Verify that prefill text widget Copy widget to all pages but last function correctly in request signature.
Verify that prefill text widget Copy widget to all pages but first function correctly in request signature.
Verify that Prefill text widget Copy widget next to current widget function correctly in request signature.
Verify that textinput field widget Copy widget to all pages function correctly in request signature.
Verify that textinput field widget Copy widget to all pages but last function correctly in request signature.
Verify that textinput field widget Copy widget to all pages but first function correctly in request signature.
Verify that textinput field widget Copy widget next to current function correctly in request signature.
Verify that the document is not uploaded if its format is not supported in request signature.
MainAppPages/Signup.spec.js
SignupPage
Reg_TC-01 Verify all page-level and field-level validations on the new user registration form.
Reg_TC-02 Verify error message for incorrect email on register.
Reg_TC-03 Verify that a new user can successfully create an account using the Free Plan.
Reg_TC-04 Verify that a user cannot register using an already existing email address.
Reg_TC-05 Verify Professional Monthly signup and subscription invoice email.

Reg_TC-07 Verify Teams Monthly signup and subscription invoice email.
Reg_TC-08 Verify Teams Yearly signup and subscription invoice email.
Reg_TC-09 Verify logout from EU-Subscription page redirects to EU-Login page.

Verify that a new free user cannot add a team and is prompted to upgrade to a Teams plan.
